mapper.insert: INSERT INTO production_order (production_no, product_id, product_name, specification, unit, quantity, price, total_amount, start_date, end_date, actual_end_date, status, responsible_person, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productionNo}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{specification}, #{unit}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{totalAmount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{actualEndDate}, #{status}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE production_order SET product_id = #{productId}, product_name = #{productName}, specification = #{specification}, unit = #{unit}, quantity = #{quantity}, price = #{price}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, actual_end_date = #{actualEndDate}, status = #{status}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM production_order
AND production_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productionNo}, '%')
